name: Stewed Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
2 medium plum tomatoes, seeded and chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, heat oil over moderately high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Saute green beans and onion with salt to taste, stirring occasionally, for 8 to 10 minutes, or until beans begin to brown.
3. Add 1/4 cup water and cook until the water is evaporated and the skillet is almost dry.
4. Add tomatoes, lemon juice, and salt to taste; stir occasionally.
5. Cook until tomatoes are browned, add the remaining 2 tablespoons water, and cook until it is evaporated and the tomatoes are very soft.
